name: dealflowpro-mcp
description: Multifamily real estate deal analysis — analyze deals, score properties, calculate max offer prices, and look up market data via AI assistants.

DFP_API_KEY.title: DealFlowPro API Key
DFP_API_KEY.description: Your DealFlowPro API key (starts with dfp_sk_). Get one at https://dealflowpro.io/api/

tools.name: analyze_deal
tools.description: Full multifamily deal analysis: cap rate, DSCR, cash-on-cash, IRR, DFP Score (0-100), max offer price, yearly cashflows

tools.name: score_deal
tools.description: Quick DFP Score (0-100) with verdict and key metrics — faster than full analysis

tools.name: reverse_calc
tools.description: Back-solve max offer price from target returns (cap rate, CoC, DSCR, IRR)

tools.name: market_data
tools.description: Flood zone, neighborhood income vs state median, and job growth for any property address
